visualizations.title: Definition of Rational Numbers
visualizations.description: Mathematical representation of rational numbers as ratios of integers.

steps.explanation: A rational number expressed as the ratio of numerator p to denominator q.
Both p and q must be integers.
The denominator must be non-zero; division by zero is undefined.

visualizations.title: Fractions on the Number Line
visualizations.description: Visualizing fractions and their positions between integers on a number line.
